comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-04-28 after plan-mode rewrite for note-authoring + .agent/srs/plan.md gap closure: the long model-facing prompts (TodoWrite, EnterPlanMode, ExitPlanMode, AskUserQuestion) and the new ClarifyingQuestionDialog + ClarifyingQuestionController + askUserQuestion tool add ~46 KB minified to main.js. The bulk is intentional prompt content (rewritten for note-authoring) plus the new in-plan-mode clarification UI (mirrors PlanApprovalDialog). Documented as a known deviation; cap remains 30 KB for incremental additions on top of this baseline.
